title: Landing Page Build
description:
Seeking help w/ the client request to build a new landing page please.

The client is getting ready to launch our $100,000 Great Big Give Back and need a landing page for this referral initiative. They have mocked up a page so we can see what they have in mind, and attached all of their assets.

*They do not yet have the form we are going to embed on the page. That is being created.
*They did not provide a desired URL so we may need one from our end.

FAQ

Do I get $500 no matter what?
No. You get paid based on the completion of a job. We have 4 tiers. 
Job Cost Advocate Fee Customer Rebate
$3000-$4999 $75 $75
$5000-$9999 $125 $125
$10,000-$19,999 $250 $250
$20,000+ $500 $500

When do I get paid?
You get paid AFTER the job is completed and the final invoice paid.

Can I refer myself?
Sorta. If you found Integrity all on your own, and you found your way to this program, you can still sign up. There are a few extra steps, like putting a yard sign at your house for the week before and after your roofing job. You will receive the rebate, but not the advocate fee. PLUS! It puts you in the position to be able to refer other people to the program.

What do I get paid in?
You get to choose from a myriad of gift cards or cash straight to your bank account. It’s up to you. 

Please do let us know what else we may need from the client.


cc  

Thanks much!

title: Page update check
description:
Seeking help with a client query please.
 
Please review these updates and see if these changes can be made to the commercial pages. 

Adding the verbatim too from the client:
Hi!
We are retooling our commercial division and need this page to reflect the greater Seattle area instead of reflecting small, commercial jobs in Kitsap County.
https://integrityrc.com/roofing/commercial

Can you go through and change any reference to Kitsap County to Seattle oriented language?

We also want to include the following information on the page.

Commercial Capabilities
• Preconstruction & Estimating
• New Construction & Re-Roof Projects
• Occupied Building Phasing
• Insurance Restoration (Xactimate-Based Scoping)
• Safety & Compliance Programs
Building Envelope Services
• Roofing Systems
• Siding Systems
• Waterproofing
• Flashing & Sheet Metal
• Envelope Inspections & Reporting

Project Types
• Large-Scale Re-Roofing Projects
• Capital Improvement Projects
• New Construction
• Insurance Loss Restoration
• Preventative Maintenance Programs

Let me know what specifics you need to make this happen.

Eventually, we will need new pages built, but this is just the start.



Thanks much!

https://integrityrc.com/

Can you please add this following script just before the close </body> tag on all pages of the site.
 
<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.callrail.com/companies/758293535/1eda716d99d7bef70d2e/12/swap.js"></script>
